summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ConnectJob app after major App.js refactoring (4367 lines -> 356 lines). All page components load correctly via sidebar navigation. Backend APIs working. Rate limiting triggered during automated testing (expected behavior).

minor.issue: Rate limiter (20 req/15min) triggered during automated testing - expected behavior, not a bug

issues: Minor: Duplicate i18n keys in locale files (register_pass_hint, contract_signing) - causes no visible issues

passed_tests: Login flow with test credentials (andrei.georgescu@test.com / Parola123!)
Dashboard/Home page loads with quick actions, categories, job listings
Sidebar navigation: all 11 nav items work correctly
PageJobs loads with job listings and filters
MapPage loads with Leaflet map, job markers, clustering, and legend
PageChat loads with conversation list and message interface
PageEscrow loads correctly
PageCalendar loads with calendar view
PageContract loads with contract form
PageReviews loads with review system
PageAnalytics loads with employer dashboard stats
PageVerify loads with verification steps
Floating buttons (Fuel Calculator and Transport) visible at bottom-left
Bottom mobile nav displays correctly on smaller viewports
Logout functionality works - redirects to login page
GET /api/health returns ok status
GET /api/jobs returns 15 jobs with required fields
Jobs have lat/lng coordinates for map clustering
Category and geo filters work on jobs endpoint
GET /api/payments/stripe-config returns configured status
Payment endpoints require authentication
Dashboard stats endpoint requires authentication
critical_code_review_comments: App.js refactoring successful - reduced from 4367 to 356 lines
All page components properly imported and rendered via state-based navigation
Minor: Duplicate i18n keys in locale files should be cleaned up
Minor: Some unused imports in page components (Badge in PageHome, PageReviews; Btn, Avatar in PageAdmin)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 15 page navigation and feature tests passed)

seed_data_creation: 15 test jobs in Cluj-Napoca area (from previous iteration)
context_for_next_testing_agent: App.js refactoring complete and verified. All page components in /pages/ directory load correctly. State-based navigation (not URL-based) working. Rate limiter may trigger during heavy automated testing - wait 15 minutes between test runs or test manually. Stripe payments in SIMULATED mode. Email notifications console-only.

mocked_apis.Stripe Escrow: SIMULATED - payments created with sim_ prefix when STRIPE_SECRET_KEY not set
mocked_apis.Email notifications: Console log only - no actual emails sent
